\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Bāhubali: The Epic
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: When a mysterious child is found by a tribal couple near a roaring waterfall, they raise him as their own. As he grows, Sivudu is drawn to the world beyond the cliffs, where he discovers the ancient kingdom of Mahishmati, ruled by a cruel tyrant, haunted by rebellion, and bound to his past. What begins as a quest for love soon unravels a legacy of betrayal, sacrifice, and a forgotten prince.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Vanaveera
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: A descendant of the Vanara clan is pushed into conflict when a modern-day Ravana seizes his only bike for an election rally. What starts as a petty injustice soon erupts into a fierce fight for self-respect and dignity.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Laila
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Sonu Model, a renowned beautician from the old city, is forced to disguise himself as Laila, leading to a series of comedic, romantic, and action-packed events. Chaos ensues in this hilarious laugh riot

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Maa Alludu Very Good
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Maa Alludu Very Good is an Comedy Romance based movie. In which,Purse Ram aka Parasuram (Naresh) is a petty thief who is grown up on stealing things since his childhood. He happens to see a girl Meghana (Mounika) and then instantly falls in love with her. He comes to know that she prefers educated guys with knowledge in various languages and cops. He impresses Meghana by feigning that he is a strict cop.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: RRR
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: A fictional history of two legendary revolutionaries' journey away from home before they began fighting for their country in the 1920s.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: The Rajasaab
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Seeking his lost grandfather, a young man enters a haunted mansion and awakens a family curse powerful enough to upend both his life and reality.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Annayya
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Rajaram (Chiranjeevi), owner of a fleet of lorries, meets Devi (Soundarya), a garment factory owner. After that acquaintance, she once seeks his help in dealing with two street ruffians, who were teasing her sisters, Lata (Chandini) and Geetha (Sishwa), and is shocked when the culprits turn out to be his brothers, Ravi (Ravi Teja) and Gopi (Venkat). Rajaram takes the incident lightly as the pranks of youngsters and is very lenient to them. With more such incidents, the two fall in love, with the brothers and sisters not far behind.  On his brothers' request, Rajaram approaches Devi for her sisters' hands in marriage to his brothers. But she curtly refuses her consent on grounds that the two are wayward drunkards. Rajaram reacts sharply to it and vows to get his brothers married to her sisters.  Since then on he is more exacting with his brothers and brings about a transformation in them. Devi agrees to their marriage.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Devara: Part 1
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Devara, a fearless man from a coastal region, embarks on a perilous journey into the treacherous world of the sea to safeguard the lives of his people. Unbeknownst to him, his brother Bhaira is plotting a conspiracy against him. As events unfold, Devara passes on his legacy to his mild-mannered and timid son, Varada.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Mension House Mallesh
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: In a quiet village where gossip spreads faster than the wind, a swaggering young man becomes the talk of the town after his wedding night sparks unexpected rumours. What follows is a hilarious chain of misunderstandings, ego clashes, and small-town chaos. Mension House Mallesh is a lively rural entertainer packed with satire and nonstop laughter.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Maama Mascheendra
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Parasuram, shaped by traumatic childhood experiences, evolves into a ruthless enforcer, with the help of his aid Ramadasu, willing to sacrifice even his own family for immense wealth. Several years later, Parasuram's daughter, Vishalakshi falls head over heels for Durga in Visakhapatnam and Meenakshi, Dasu's daughter falls for the renowned DJ in Hyderabad. Parasuram becomes suspicious, suspecting that his nephews, strikingly resembling him, might be plotting revenge under the guise of love.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Salaar: Part 1 - Ceasefire
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Set in the fictional dystopian city-state of Khansaar, the film follows the friendship between Deva, a tribesman, and Varadha, the prince of Khansaar. When a coup d'état is planned by his father's ministers and his relatives, Varadha enlists Deva's help to become Khansaar's undisputed ruler.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Bāhubali: The Beginning
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: The young Shivudu is left as a foundling in a small village by his mother. By the time he’s grown up, it has become apparent that he possesses exceptional gifts. He meets the beautiful warrior princess Avanthika and learns that her queen has been held captive for the last 25 years. Shividu sets off to rescue her, discovering his own origins in the process.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Shivam
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: A fearless young man with a knack for helping couples elope finds himself on the run when a powerful gangster targets him, leading to a high-stakes chase where his own love life is the ultimate prize.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Bāhubali 2: The Conclusion
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: When Mahendra, the son of Bāhubali, learns about his heritage, he begins to look for answers. His story is juxtaposed with past events that unfolded in the Mahishmati Kingdom.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Hi Nanna
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Six-year-old Mahi, a spirited child with cystic fibrosis, shares a deep yet complex bond with her father, Viraj, a dedicated single parent and successful fashion photographer. Her curiosity about her absent mother leads to a journey of discovery when she runs away with her loyal dog, Pluto. A chance encounter with a kind woman named Yashna sparks unexpected revelations, intertwining their lives in ways they never anticipated. Set against a backdrop of love, sacrifice, and redemption, Mahi’s story is a heartfelt exploration of family, resilience, and the enduring power of connection.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Kalki 2898-AD
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: In the year 2898 AD, around 6000 years after Kurukshetra war, Ashwatthama gears up for his final battle of redemption at the sign of hope in a dystopian world and Bhairava, a wisecracking and self-interested bounty hunter, tired of the perilous life becomes the hurdle in the process.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: The Family Star
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Govardhan, a devoted architect from Hyderabad, juggles supporting his extended family while seeking a partner who understands his commitments. When he discovers Indu thesis on his family, he challenges her, leading to unexpected twists as they navigate misunderstandings and eventually find love amidst sacrifice and understanding

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Dacoit
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Betrayed by his better half, a man is convicted for a crime he didn't commit. Once free, he hunts her down in pursuit of vengeance, as their stories intertwine with a series of robberies.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Pushpa: The Rise
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: As Pushpa, a labourer, rises in the world of red sandalwood smuggling, he ends up making many enemies. However, violence ensues when the police try to topple his illegal business.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Little Hearts
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Akhil, when failed in EAMCET exam, is forced into long-term coaching after heartbreak teaches him the difference between true and shallow love. At the center, he meets Katyayani and falls for her, only to be rejected for a strange reason. Determined not to lose her, his humorous and transformative journey to win her heart becomes the soul of the story.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Thodi Kodallu
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Lawyer Ganapathi and his wife Annapurna are the eldest members of a family. His brother Subbu and his wife Anusuya live in the village. The duo treats their cousin brother Gopu, who is an idealist, as their own sibling. Annapurna is a chronic patient so Gopu's wife Susheela takes care of the family. Jealous of the bonding between Annapurna and Susheela, Anusuya creates a rift between them. Gopu and Susheela move to the village. Gopu propounds cooperative farming and prospers.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Lucky Baskhar
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: A cash-strapped bank cashier embarks on a risky investment scheme and soon gets drawn into the murky world of money laundering.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Pushpa 2 - The Rule
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: As his smuggling empire grows, a brazen Pushpa longs for power and respect on his vengeful journey, while facing old rivals and new.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: A tribal boy is shaped by the values of his teacher, who gives him the name 'Bhagat Singh'. He grows up deeply rooted in strong morals, which guide his actions throughout his life.He stands firm against injustice and takes on powerful evil forces, even when facing overwhelming odds.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Saaho
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: A battle for power ensues as warring gangters thrive to gain possession of a "black box" that can make them richer than they already are, and an undercover cop intervenes with the help of his sharp intellect and an instinct to kill.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Band Melam
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Giri and Raaji grew up together in a small village; their love and bonding also grew, but changing fortunes and misunderstandings drove them and their families apart. While Raaji moves ahead with her studies, Giri searches for his path through music with his village band. Life takes them in completely different directions until circumstances bring them face to face again. What really unfolds between them forms the rest of the story.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Peddi
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: In 1980s rural Andhra Pradesh, A spirited villager unites his community through sports to defend their pride against a powerful rival.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Sita Ramam
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Afreen, a rebellious Pakistani student sets ablaze the car of an Indian in London. Angered Afreen returns to Pakistan to ask for money from her grandfather that she has to pay in a month's time as damages. However, she gets to know that he is no more and the only thing he has left for her is a letter-delivering task, written by Ram to Sita. As Afreen sets out to find Ram, there begins her journey of discovering the secret behind the 20-year-old letter.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Kuberaa
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: A ruthless billionaire, Neeraj, uses beggars as benamis to launder money, with the help of a disgraced civil submit servant, Deepak. One of the beggars, Deva, escapes with ₹10,000 crores and becomes the target of a deadly manhunt. He meets Sameera, who joins him in his mission to use the money to uplift society's poor. With Deepak's help, Deva fights back.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Akhanda 2: Thaandavam
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: When all hope died, Akhanda arrived. He saved his family, protected his people, killed the wrongdoers, and retreated into isolation. But years later, new threats emerge putting the world in danger. And as the world burns, Akhanda returns.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: #Single
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Vijay, a bank employee, falls in love with Purva at first sight and attempts to get closer to her in hopes of winning her affection. Meanwhile, Harini who secretly harbours feelings for Vijay, begins to follow him—turning his love life into a comedic triangle.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: (MAD)²
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: After his wedding turns into a disaster, Laddu and his pals — Manoj, Ashok and Damodar — find themselves traveling to Goa for another wild adventure.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Chinna Kodalu
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: A blind man, his merciless wife, their sheepish sons and stony-hearted daughter torture the eldest daughter-in-law, who is naive. But things change when the youngest son gets married to an orphan. Seeing this, she decides to teach them a lesson and make them mend their ways.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Arundhati
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Arundhati  belongs to Gadwal samsthanam in 1920’s. She is known for her bravery in saving the Samstanam by killing Pasupathi an evildoer. But the spirit of Pasupathi haunts that place. Another girl is born in the same lineage after 3 generations and she is named as Arundhati. The spirit of Pasupati is after Arundhati to take the revenge.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Vāranāsi
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Follows Rudhra's perilous adventures as ancient Varanasi stands on the brink of catastrophe from a looming asteroid in 2027 CE, unfolding across multiple timelines and distant continents.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Ala Vaikunthapurramuloo
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: After growing up enduring criticism from his father, a young man finds his world shaken upon learning he was switched at birth with a millionaire's son.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Hari Hara Veera Mallu: Part 1 – Sword vs Spirit
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.original_title: హరి హర వీర మల్లు: భాగం 1 – Sword vs Spirit
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Set in the 1650s Mughal Era, Veera Mallu, a Robin Hood-like outlaw with secret motives is hired to steal the Koh-i-Noor from Aurangzeb’s palace. He is joined by a crew of misfits, each talented in their own way, to complete the mission.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: Game Changer
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: Ram, a newly appointed district collector, takes charge in a city in Andhra Pradesh and immediately confronts the deeply entrenched corruption and inefficiency plaguing the government. Determined to bring reforms, he initiates sweeping changes, sparking a fierce conflict with a powerful state Minister.

\ud83d\udd25 Popular.title: HIT: The Third Case
\ud83d\udd25 Popular.overview: The Homicide Intervention Team (HIT) sends ruthless police officer Arjun Sarkaar to find a group of killers and stop their grisly murder spree.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Anaganaga Oka Raju
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: A lazy, entitled brat who wants to lead an easy life is in for a rude shock that changes the course of his life.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Mana ShankaraVaraPrasad Garu
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: National security officer Vara Prasad, protecting his estranged wife and kids from a vengeful ex-cop, sees it as a chance to rebuild their relationship after six years apart.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Raju Weds Rambai
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: Raju Weds Rambai is inspired by a real story of a carefree band drummer whose love for a compounders daughter triggers a clash of ego and honour, turning their sweet village romance into an emotional journey filled with conflict, pain, and ultimately redemption.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: The Girlfriend
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: A college literature student falls for a charming man with a domineering streak, forcing her to confront the toxic truth of his desire.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Mirai
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: Following the historic Kalinga battle, where King Ashoka of the Maurya dynasty emerged as the winner, he chose to walk the path of peace instead of continuing warfare. Yet, the kingdom appointed nine warriors to protect some ancient scriptures rumored to have the ability to make someone divine or godlike.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Kingdom
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: Soori, a modest police constable, is unintentionally dragged into a dangerous undercover spy operation in Sri Lanka for the Indian government. His journey is intimately linked to his estranged brother Siva, and the risks involved on their reunion.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Kannappa
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: After witnessing the cruel sacrifice of his childhood friend, an atheist warrior rejects religion until love forces him to find his own faith.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Subham
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: Set in the early 2000s, in the pre-internet days of coastal Bheemili, A group of married men band together to find solutions, after their wives get possessed while watching a cable TV soap opera serial.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Odela 2
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: A savior, Odela Mallanna Swamy, protects a village from evil forces.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Court: State vs. A Nobody
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: A determined lawyer takes on a high-stakes case to defend a 19-year-old boy, challenging a system that has already branded him guilty.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Thandel
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: Fisherman Raju is deeply in love with Satya. However, at one point, she urges him to stop going to the sea and look for other jobs. Ignoring her plea, Raju ventures out and accidentally drifts into Pakistani waters, where he is arrested.

\ud83c\udd95 Latest.title: Sankranthiki Vasthunam
\ud83c\udd95 Latest.overview: When a renowned tech entrepreneur is kidnapped upon returning to India, a police officer recruits her ex-boyfriend, a former cop now living a quiet family life, to assist in the rescue mission.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: V
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: A celebrated cop, DCP Aditya, faces his toughest challenge when a taunting serial killer begins targeting victims and leaving notes meant for him. Teaming with an aspiring crime novelist, he must stop four more murders to save his medals, career, and reputation while uncovering the killer's past.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: Arjun Reddy
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: A brilliant but impulsive young surgeon spirals into self-destruction after a painful breakup, struggling to cope with love, loss, and the consequences of his own temper.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: The Ghazi Attack
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: India’s first underwater war film tries to decode the mystery behind the sinking of Pakistani submarine PNS Ghazi during the Indo-Pak war of 1971.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: Geetha Govindam
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: Vijay Govind, a young college lecturer who dreams of marriage falls for Geetha, a level-headed woman who's wary of strangers and isn't easy to convince. While things seem to go smoothly, Vijay makes a terrible mistake which not only derails any hope for his love story, but also potential repercussions with his family.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: Rangasthalam
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: Chitti Babu begins to suspect his elder brother's life is in danger after they team up to lock horns with their village president and overthrow his unlawful 30 year old regime.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: Jersey
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: After his career fails to take off, a gifted cricketer in his mid-thirties decides that he’s not ready to give up quite yet.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: Bharat Ane Nenu
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: Bharat, a graduate from Oxford, is forced to take up his father's position as the chief minister after his sudden demise. He is not happy with the way government is functioning in the state and tries to reform the corrupt society but faces obstacles from his enemies.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: Sarileru Neekevvaru
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: A tough army major is deployed to Kurnool on a mission to keep the country safe from external threats.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: Son of Satyamurthy
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: The son of a rich businessman struggles to save his father's wealth after his demise. However, he faces many challenges when he becomes the sole breadwinner of his family.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: DJ: Duvvada Jagannadham
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: A righteous young man who helps everyone gain their rightful justice, gets recruited as an undercover agent to work on a high profile case that involves a crime lord working for a corrupt minister who also happens to be the father of his romantic interest.

\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.title: Red
\ud83c\udfc6 Classics.overview: When civil engineer Siddharth is arrested for a murder on the basis of a pictorial evidence, cops discover his lookalike Aditya and realize they have only 48 hours to solve the case.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Eega
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Nani is a flower decorator, madly in love with his neighbor Bindhu. He gets killed by the baddie, Sudeep, a powerful businessman. Nani comes back as a housefly to get his revenge.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Magadheera
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: A street-bike racer chances upon a woman and is struck by visions of a past life where they were both star-crossed lovers in a war-ridden kingdom 400 years ago, while the reincarnation of his romantic rival emerges with murderous intent.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: 1: Nenokkadine
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: A rock star must overcome his psychological inhibitions to seek revenge for his parents' death.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Athadu
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: A hitman, Nandu, is hired to stage the assassination of a politician. However, when the politician is actually killed and Nandu is framed for the murder, he assumes a dead man's identity to evade the law.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Pokiri
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Pandu is a contract killer and will accept any contract provided the amount is right. The police want him for questioning, while the underworld needs him to silence their opponents. No one really knows this assassin's background. It is only Pandu who knows his real identity, and he has no intention of sharing it with anyone.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Yevadu
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Satya is given a different face after he suffers burn-related injuries. After being released from the hospital, he deals with the murderer of his lover Deepti. But his new face has given him new foes.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Khaleja
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: A village is hounded by an unknown disease, decimating its population. The village priest prophesies that God's avatar will save them. Siddha goes in search of this supernatural potential and finds it in Seetarama Raju, a cab driver.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Manam
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: A married couple die in an accident, leaving behind a son. As he grows up and becomes successful, he comes across reincarnations of his father and mother as youngsters, and vows to bring them back together.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Businessman
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Just as the cops have declared the end of Mafia in Mumbai, a man named Surya arrives in the city with the intentions of conquering it.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Race Gurram
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Ram and Lakshman, aka Lucky, are brothers who are polar opposites in nature. Their mother wishes to see them united.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Rebel
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: After his parents are brutally murdered, a man goes on a quest to find his parents' killers. He finds that his own uncle is involved in the killings.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Dookudu
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: To protect his father recovering from a coma, a relentless cop must pose as the political leader his father always envisioned while hunting the men who tried to kill him.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Aarya
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Aarya is a happy-go-lucky young man who goes to college. When he falls in love with Geetha at first sight, he proposes to her - in front of her boyfriend Ajay, who recently also proposed to her. She bluntly refuses, but ...

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Aarya 2
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Two young boys staying together at an orphanage become friends. One of them is adopted by a wealthy family and grows up to become the owner of a software company. He provides employment for his friend, but when they both fall in love with the same young woman, conflict emerges.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Okkadu
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Ajay, a fiery Kabaddi player from Hyderabad, visits Kurnool for a tournament and rescues Swapna from a faction leader Obul Reddy, who wants to force her into marriage. He secretly hides her in his home and assists her in planning her escape abroad for her higher studies. But, fate has other plans.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Julayi
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: An intelligent young man and a timid cop team up to catch a criminal who wants revenge after a foiled bank robbery.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Bommarillu
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Siddu is the son of an over-protective business man. Every decision of his is made by his father, which leads him into frustration. He half-heartedly agrees to become engaged to a rich man's daughter, but then falls for a middle-class man's daughter called Haasini. The film focuses on his realization that he has to stand on his own and come out of his father's protective shell - and try to succeed in love.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Vedam
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Five people from varied strata of society – a slum dweller who works as a cable operator, a runaway prostitute, a desperate woman drowning in debt, a rising musician, and a grief-stricken Muslim man – end up together in the same hospital, at a time when it is attacked by terrorists.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Kick
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: Kalyan is a kind of guy who prefers a life full of thrills than leading a regular life style. He seeks kick in whatever he does. He finds liking in Naina. They separate due to differences. Krishna is a young cop who is in lookout for a big ticket thief who happens to be Kalyan. Meanwhile, Naina agrees for an engagement with Krishna. The rest of the story is all about how Kalyan wins back his lady love and the real intent behind the robberies of Kalyan.

\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.title: Seethamma Vakitlo Sirimalle Chettu
\ud83d\udcfc Old Classics.overview: An exuberant and evocative family drama, that primarily revolves around the close bond between two brothers with radically different personalities, highlighting the complex process of choosing an ideal life partner for each of them.
